activationMode.description: The activation mode of the tabs.

composite.description: Whether the tabs are composed with other composite widgets.

defaultValue.description: The initial selected tab value when uncontrolled.

deselectable.description: Whether the active tab can be deselected when clicking on it.

focusChange.description: Emits when focus moves between tab triggers. Mirrors Zag `onFocusChange`.

id.description: The unique identifier of the tabs.

ids.type:
Partial<{
    root: string
    trigger: (value: string) => string
    list: string
    content: (value: string) => string
    indicator: string
  }>
ids.description: The ids of the elements in the tabs. Useful for composition.

loopFocus.description: Whether keyboard navigation loops from last tab to first and vice versa.

navigate.description: Function to navigate to the selected tab when trigger elements are anchors.

navigateChange.description: Emits when an anchor trigger requests navigation. Mirrors Zag `navigate`.

value.description: The tabs machine returned by useTabs().
The unique value of the tab.
The value of the tab content.
